subtitles.original: パッパッパヤ パッパパパヤ
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa-ya, pa-pa-pa-pa-ya

subtitles.original: パッパッパヤ パッパパパヤ
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa-ya, pa-pa-pa-pa-ya

subtitles.original: パッパッパヤ パッパパパヤ
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa-ya, pa-pa-pa-pa-ya

subtitles.original: パッパッパヤ パッパパパヤ
subtitles.english: Pa-pa-pa-ya, pa-pa-pa-pa-ya

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで、最初のゲストはシロちゃんだよ！
subtitles.english: All right! So, our very first guest is... Shiro-chan!

subtitles.original: こんにちは！ときの、シロです！
subtitles.english: Hello! This is Tokino... Shiro!

subtitles.original: あ、ときのシロになっちゃった！
subtitles.english: Ah, she became Tokino Shiro!

subtitles.original: 本当に今日はそらちゃん、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Sora-chan, happy birthday to you! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: すごいね、格好！
subtitles.english: That's an amazing outfit!

subtitles.original: そらちゃんという歌姫に会えると聞いて、出せるものは全部出して行こうと思います。
subtitles.english: Hearing I'd meet a diva like Sora-chan, I thought I should show off everything I've got.

subtitles.original: そ、そういうことだったんだ。待って、これチャンネルBANしちゃったら…
subtitles.english: Oh, so that was the reason. Wait, if this gets the channel banned...

subtitles.original: そんなことない！
subtitles.english: No way!

subtitles.original: ごめんなさい！大丈夫、大丈夫。胸が苦しくなってきました！大丈夫。
subtitles.english: I'm sorry! I'm fine, I'm fine. Oh, my chest is tightening! I'm okay.

subtitles.original: あ、そらちゃん、クラゲさんには注射器があると聞きます。
subtitles.english: Sora-chan, I heard jellyfish have stingers.

subtitles.original: 注射器？
subtitles.english: Stingers?

subtitles.original: 毒針をぜひ、頭でごちゅんと後ろに刺していただけませんか？
subtitles.english: Could you please bonk me on the head with your stinger?

subtitles.original: ごちゅん！
subtitles.english: Bonk!

subtitles.original: うっ、ううっ、倒れる、倒れちゃう…
subtitles.english: Ugh... I'm collapsing, I'm going to collapse...

subtitles.original: すごい効いてきました！
subtitles.english: It's working so well!

subtitles.original: 効いてきた？
subtitles.english: It's working?

subtitles.original: 皆さん、そらちゃんは変わりました。毒針を持った女に変わったんです！
subtitles.english: Everyone, Sora-chan has changed. She turned into a woman with a deadly stinger!

subtitles.original: そう、私強くなったから！
subtitles.english: That's right, because I've gotten stronger!

subtitles.original: そらちゃんは毒針が持ちたくて、可愛いクラゲヘアになったんですか？
subtitles.english: Did you get this cute jellyfish hair just to have a stinger, Sora-chan?

subtitles.original: 違う違う。私はやっぱり、アイドルと言えばこういう可愛い髪型の人が多いかなと思って、そういうアイドルっぽい髪型にしたいなと思ってたんだよね。
subtitles.english: No, no! I just thought idols usually have cute hairstyles like this, so I wanted to try a more idol-like look.

subtitles.original: はぁ〜。そらちゃん聞いてください。私もアイドルしかないし、歌姫でしかないのに、ディーバっていう曲もあるんですけど、今もアイドルであろうとこう…なんか、なってるのに…
subtitles.english: Sigh... Sora-chan, listen to me. I'm also nothing but an idol and a diva, and I even have a song called "Diva," but even as I try to be an idol...

subtitles.original: なんか、なってるのに…
subtitles.english: Even though I'm trying so hard...

subtitles.original: 努力してくれる姿がもう大好きで、食べたいくらい。
subtitles.english: But I love how hard you work so much, I want to eat you up!

subtitles.original: 食べちゃうの？
subtitles.english: You're going to eat me?

subtitles.original: シナモンロールみたいですね。見てカメラさん、見て見て！
subtitles.english: You look like a cinnamon roll. Look, Camera-san, look!

subtitles.original: これはシナモンロール？
subtitles.english: Is this a cinnamon roll?

subtitles.original: シナモンロール。食べられてる、食べられてる。
subtitles.english: Cinnamon roll! I'm eating you, I'm eating you up.

subtitles.original: うふふ、ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Ehehe, thank you.

subtitles.original: はい、ということで。
subtitles.english: And so...

subtitles.original: 今日はBANされない発言を心がけていきます！
subtitles.english: Today, I will do my best to make family-friendly comments that won't get us banned!

subtitles.original: もうすでに結構シロちゃんワールド炸裂してますけど。
subtitles.english: You've already let the "Shiro-chan World" explode quite a bit, though.

subtitles.original: あの、なんかこんな、大好きなそらちゃんのこんな場に、そらともさんたちと一緒に祝ってもらえると思わなくて。ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Well, I just didn't expect to be able to celebrate with Soratomos at my beloved Sora-chan's special event. Thank you.

subtitles.original: 3年ぶりだよ。
subtitles.english: It's been three years.

subtitles.original: あ！3年ぶりの元カノです。
subtitles.english: Ah! I'm your ex-girlfriend of three years.

subtitles.original: 元カノじゃない、そらともさん！
subtitles.english: Not your ex-girlfriend! You mean Soratomos!

subtitles.original: そらともさん、一緒に、一緒に、独り占めしないので、愛でていきましょう。
subtitles.english: Soratomos, let's love her together. I won't keep her all to myself.

subtitles.original: 今日はそらともさんに、シロの来た意味を分からせたいと思います。そらちゃん立ってください。
subtitles.english: Today, I want to show all the Soratomos why Shiro came here today. Sora-chan, please stand up.

subtitles.original: はい。
subtitles.english: Okay.
Three, two, one...

subtitles.original: バニーガールズ！
subtitles.english: Bunny Girls!

subtitles.original: このスクショでいいの？ねぇ。
subtitles.english: Is this a good screenshot pose? Hey.

subtitles.original: 千手観音、千手観音。
subtitles.english: Thousand-Armed Kannon! Thousand-Armed Kannon!

subtitles.original: 千手観音？
subtitles.english: Thousand-Armed Kannon?

subtitles.original: そらちゃん、新衣装のバニー衣装プレゼントしに来ました！
subtitles.english: Sora-chan, I came to present you with your new bunny outfit!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: どうですか？
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: 可愛い、うさ耳も可愛い！
subtitles.english: It's so cute! The bunny ears are adorable too!

subtitles.original: うさぎさんって万年発情してるので、ちょっとハァハァしてもらって…
subtitles.english: Bunnies are in heat all year round, so could you pant a little bit...

subtitles.original: え？
subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.original: 可愛いー！
subtitles.english: So cute!

subtitles.original: 私のしっぽもあるよ。
subtitles.english: Look, I have a tail too.

subtitles.original: あ！そうだ、そらちゃんといえば、しっぽは？
subtitles.english: Ah! That's right, speaking of Sora-chan, what about your tail?

subtitles.original: そう、ちょっと…
subtitles.english: Yeah, it's right...

subtitles.original: ちょっと触ってもいいですか？
subtitles.english: Can I touch it for a second?

subtitles.original: いいよ。
subtitles.english: Sure.

subtitles.original: ツンツン、あっ、あっ、大変！
subtitles.english: Poke, poke... Oh, oh no!

subtitles.original: 何？
subtitles.english: What is it?

subtitles.original: シロ、発情が止まらないので、そろそろおうちに帰ります！
subtitles.english: Shiro's heat won't stop, so it's time for me to go home!

subtitles.original: 帰っちゃうの？
subtitles.english: You're going home?!

subtitles.original: はい！月からみんなを見守っています。この後も楽しんでね！
subtitles.english: Yes! I'll be watching over everyone from the moon. Enjoy the rest of the stream!

subtitles.original: 楽しんでね、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Have fun! Thank you!

subtitles.original: あ、なんか出てきてる。
subtitles.english: Oh, something's coming out.

subtitles.original: ちょっと、帰れてないよ！
subtitles.english: Wait, you haven't fully left yet!

subtitles.original: シロちゃんワールド炸裂で、楽しかったね。なんだこれって言わないでね、みんな。ねー。
subtitles.english: That was a full-on explosion of the Shiro-chan World. Please don't ask "What was that?" everyone, okay?

subtitles.original: でも、相変わらずのシロちゃんで、私一緒に歌えてとっても楽しかったです。マイペースだね、ねー、マイペースだよ。
subtitles.english: But she's still the same old Shiro-chan. I had so much fun singing with her! She really goes at her own pace.

subtitles.original: 私もマイペースだから、良いコンビってことだ。
subtitles.english: I go at my own pace too, so that makes us a great duo!

subtitles.original: というわけで、続いてのゲストに行きましょう！この人です！
subtitles.english: So, let's move on to the next guest! Here they are!

responses.thoughts:
**A Whirlwind of Virtual Friendship and Bunny Girls**

Okay, so the instructions are clear: transcribe, translate, and capture every nuance. Here's how *I* see this whole segment unfolding:

It begins, naturally, with a burst of "Meisei Galactica," those energetic opening lines. Time to focus; it's always tricky to get the exact timing down. Then, it's Shiro, bursting onto the scene at 00:26, full of energy as my very first guest! "Tokino Shiro desu!" she announces, and *I* can't help but laugh, the situation is completely surreal.

It seems the theme is "show off everything I've got," which is interesting. Wait, now I need to remember the order of words! Oh gosh, channel ban incoming! I am slightly flustered, since Shiro's energy is something else entirely. "Oh my chest is tightening! I'm okay."

Suddenly, there's a stinger... and Shiro wants to be bonked on the head! It's so Shiro. Okay, now things are escalating. "I'm collapsing, I'm going to collapse," she cries, then declares, "It's working so well!" It's such a Shiro move. "She turned into a woman with a deadly stinger!" We're playing along, obviously. I'm strong now! No need to back down from this absurdity. Oh, those cute jellyfish curls, a natural for a virtual idol. She wants to be an idol!

So Shiro is still an idol, she has her own Diva song. And she wants to "eat me up!" This is getting out of hand, she *is* a cinnamon roll. "Is this a cinnamon roll?" and of course she just wants to eat me up. Well, *I* do love the energy. She *is* going to try her best to not get us banned.

Wait, are we back to the start?

It's been three years. I'm not her ex-girlfriend, *I* am Soratomo! It's our job to be together in this love. Alright, time to present a bunny outfit. Now to pose as a bunny girl. "Thousand-Armed Kannon! Thousand-Armed Kannon!"... and finally the new bunny girl outfit. "It's so cute!"

Bunnies in heat? Wow, let's play along. "Wait, what?" This Shiro knows how to be silly.

Then, there's the tail question... is it okay if she touches it?

"I'll be watching over everyone from the moon," she says as she disappears, but then, she doesn't.

"Shiro-chan World," complete with glitches and all. Let's make sure everyone understands this is Shiro! I'm so glad we got to sing together! It works because we're both totally doing our own thing. Time to meet the next guest!
